summary: Added a user identification badge to the Toolbar, Project Uploader, and Admin Page to show the currently logged-in user at the top of the interface.

plan.title: Add user badge to Toolbar
plan.description: Modify client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx to display the current username next to the zoom controls.

plan.title: Enhance user display in Project Uploader
plan.description: Modify client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx to show a prominent user badge with username and role next to the logout button.

plan.title: Add user badge to Admin Page
plan.description: Modify client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx to display the current user in the header for consistency.

acceptance_criteria.description: Toolbar component in client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx imports User from lucide-react and renders it conditionally based on user data.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx and verify the presence of {user && ...} rendering the username.

acceptance_criteria.description: PDFUploader component in client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx displays both username and role in a badge at the top right.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx and verify the added user information block in the header.

acceptance_criteria.description: AdminPage component in client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx displays the current user's identity in the header.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx and verify the added user identity section in the header.
Run 'npm run check' (tsc) and ensure no errors are reported.

risks: Potential UI layout shifts on small screens if the username is too long (mitigated by truncate and hidden/sm:flex classes).
